meta.purpose: Reusable industrial IoT case study database for SEO credibility, solution page support, internal linking, and future case article generation.

field_definitions.title: Human-readable case study title.
field_definitions.country_or_region: Target market or deployment region. Use anonymized region when no real customer location is available.
field_definitions.priority: SEO/business priority: P1, P2, or P3.
field_definitions.proof_level: Evidence level: needs_real_data, can_use_anonymized_data, or concept_only.
field_definitions.devices: IoTEdges product types used in the case.
field_definitions.protocols: Industrial protocols and communication technologies used.
field_definitions.sensors_or_assets: Meters, sensors, machines, or assets connected.
field_definitions.result: Result narrative. Use conservative wording until verified.
field_definitions.metrics_to_collect: Specific metrics needed to turn this into a strong published case.
field_definitions.related_knowledge: Knowledge base pages to internally link.

cases.title: Factory Energy Meter Data Collection with Modbus to MQTT Gateway
cases.challenge: The plant needed centralized visibility into electricity usage across production lines without replacing existing Modbus meters.
cases.solution: IoTEdges gateway collected meter registers over RS485/Modbus and published normalized energy data to an MQTT broker for dashboarding and alerts.
cases.result: The deployment enabled line-level energy visibility and faster abnormal consumption investigation.
cases.notes: High-priority first case because it supports both product and solution commercial intent.

cases.title: Solar Inverter Monitoring over RS485 and MQTT
cases.challenge: The operator needed remote inverter data and alarm visibility from a site without stable wired internet.
cases.solution: A cellular MQTT gateway polled inverter data over RS485 and transmitted production, status, and alarm values to the monitoring platform.
cases.result: The operator could monitor generation and inverter alarms remotely instead of relying on manual site inspection.
related_products: Modbus Gateway for Solar Inverter Monitoring
cases.notes: Good early solar case; verify inverter protocol details before publishing.

cases.title: Remote Pump Station Monitoring with 4G RTU
cases.challenge: The water operator needed pump status, tank level, and alarms from remote pump stations with limited network infrastructure.
cases.solution: IoTEdges 4G RTU collected digital and analog signals and sent telemetry and alarms to a central monitoring platform.
cases.result: The system reduced manual patrol requirements and improved visibility into pump station faults.
cases.notes: Core water infrastructure case and one of the best conversion assets.

cases.title: Tank Level Monitoring with LoRa and RTU Data Collection
cases.challenge: Multiple tanks were spread across a wide area, making wired communication expensive and manual checking inefficient.
cases.solution: Wireless nodes collected level signals and sent data through a LoRa gateway to a central MQTT-based monitoring system.
cases.result: The operator gained remote tank visibility and earlier overflow or low-level warning capability.
cases.notes: Strong LoRa plus water solution case.

cases.title: Greenhouse Monitoring with LoRa Sensors and IoT Gateway
cases.challenge: The grower needed multi-point environmental monitoring without running signal cable across the greenhouse.
cases.solution: LoRa sensors transmitted greenhouse data to an IoTEdges gateway, which forwarded readings to a dashboard for trend analysis and alarms.
cases.result: The grower gained more consistent visibility into climate conditions across different greenhouse zones.
cases.notes: Good agriculture case with visual storytelling potential.

cases.title: Aquaculture Water Quality Monitoring with RTU and Sensors
cases.challenge: The farm needed real-time water quality visibility and alarms to reduce risk from low dissolved oxygen or abnormal pH.
cases.solution: IoTEdges RTU collected RS485 and analog sensor data and sent water quality readings to a remote monitoring platform.
cases.result: The farm could respond earlier to abnormal water quality and equipment faults.
cases.notes: Strong cross-link between agriculture and water quality pages.

cases.title: Industrial Park Air Quality Monitoring with LoRaWAN Gateway
cases.challenge: The operator needed distributed environmental data from multiple monitoring points across an industrial park.
cases.solution: Wireless environmental sensors transmitted data through LoRaWAN gateways, with MQTT forwarding to the monitoring dashboard.
cases.result: The park gained centralized environmental visibility and faster abnormal condition reporting.
cases.notes: Good for environmental authority and smart city overlap.

cases.title: Urban Flood Monitoring with River Level Sensors and 4G RTU
cases.site_type: Urban drainage and river monitoring points
cases.challenge: City operators needed earlier warning of rising water levels across distributed drainage and river locations.
cases.solution: RTUs and LoRa gateways collected level and rainfall data and sent threshold alarms to a central platform.
cases.result: The city team gained better situational awareness during heavy rainfall events.
cases.notes: High-value public infrastructure case.

cases.title: Street Light Monitoring and Remote Control with LoRa Gateway
cases.challenge: The city needed remote visibility into lighting cabinet status and a scalable way to control distributed lights.
cases.solution: Remote IO modules and LoRa gateways collected cabinet signals and enabled command transmission through the monitoring platform.
cases.result: Operators could identify faults and schedule remote lighting control more efficiently.
cases.notes: Verify remote control safety and electrical boundaries before publishing.

cases.title: Pipeline Pressure Monitoring with 4G RTU
cases.challenge: The operator needed continuous pipeline pressure and alarm visibility from remote sections.
cases.solution: A 4G RTU collected pressure, flow, and valve status data and transmitted alarms and trends to the monitoring center.
cases.result: The operator improved remote awareness of abnormal pressure changes and equipment status.
cases.notes: Avoid leak-detection claims unless validated by customer data.

cases.title: Telecom Generator Fuel Tank Monitoring with RTU
cases.challenge: The telecom operator needed visibility into fuel level, generator status, and cabinet alarms at unmanned remote towers.
cases.solution: IoTEdges RTU collected fuel, generator, and security signals and transmitted them through cellular MQTT connectivity.
cases.result: The operator gained better planning data for refueling and maintenance dispatch.
cases.notes: Excellent case for telecom and remote site cluster.

cases.title: Cold Storage Temperature Monitoring with LoRa Gateway
cases.challenge: The warehouse needed multi-point temperature records and alarms without installing long cable runs.
cases.solution: Wireless temperature sensors reported through a LoRa gateway, while MQTT delivered real-time data and alarms to the platform.
cases.result: The warehouse gained centralized temperature visibility and faster exception handling.
cases.notes: Good visual and conversion case for cold chain.

cases.title: Pharmaceutical Storage Temperature Monitoring with IoT Gateway
cases.challenge: The facility needed continuous environmental records and fast temperature exception alerts.
cases.solution: IoTEdges gateway collected temperature and humidity readings and transmitted data to a centralized monitoring system.
cases.result: The facility improved environmental visibility and alarm handling for storage areas.
cases.notes: Avoid regulatory compliance claims unless verified by project documentation.

cases.title: Data Center Environment and Power Monitoring with Remote IO
cases.challenge: Facility teams needed a unified view of power and environmental alarms from multiple equipment room assets.
cases.solution: Remote IO and MQTT gateway collected meter, UPS, leak, door, and temperature signals for central monitoring.
cases.result: The team gained better alarm visibility across power and environmental conditions.
cases.notes: Good facility case linking building, energy, and telecom-style monitoring.

cases.title: Chiller Plant Monitoring with Modbus Gateway
cases.challenge: The facility needed to collect chiller and pump operating data for energy analysis and fault visibility.
cases.solution: IoTEdges gateway connected to Modbus equipment and published key operating data to a cloud dashboard.
cases.result: Facility managers gained clearer visibility into chiller plant operation and energy use.
cases.notes: Good commercial building and energy case.

cases.title: OEM Machine Remote Diagnostics with MQTT Edge Gateway
cases.site_type: Distributed OEM machines at customer sites
cases.challenge: The machine builder needed remote visibility into machine status after delivery to reduce support delays.
cases.solution: An IoTEdges edge gateway collected PLC and machine data and published telemetry and alarms to the OEM service platform.
cases.result: The OEM gained a remote diagnostics channel for after-sales service and troubleshooting.
cases.notes: High-value case for OEM export positioning.

cases.title: Machine Runtime Monitoring with Remote IO Modules
cases.challenge: The factory needed runtime and downtime visibility from older machines without replacing PLCs.
cases.solution: Remote IO modules collected run/stop and alarm signals, while a gateway forwarded production data to the dashboard.
cases.result: The factory gained machine-level runtime visibility for production analysis.
cases.notes: Practical factory case for brownfield equipment.

cases.title: Air Compressor Monitoring with Modbus RTU Gateway
cases.challenge: Maintenance teams needed visibility into compressor operating status, pressure, alarms, and runtime.
cases.solution: A Modbus gateway collected compressor data over RS485 and transmitted status and alarms to the monitoring platform.
cases.result: The maintenance team gained better visibility into compressor usage and abnormal operation.
cases.notes: Good factory utility case; lower priority than energy and machine runtime.

cases.title: Substation Remote Monitoring with RTU and Modbus Gateway
cases.challenge: The operator needed remote visibility into electrical parameters and alarm status from unmanned substations.
cases.solution: IoTEdges RTU and Modbus gateway collected meter and alarm data and sent it to the central monitoring system.
cases.result: The operator improved remote alarm awareness and reduced the need for routine manual checks.
cases.notes: High-value energy and utility case.

cases.title: Battery Energy Storage Monitoring with Edge Gateway
cases.challenge: The site needed to collect battery, power conversion, and meter data for monitoring and alarms.
cases.solution: An edge gateway integrated Modbus data from energy equipment and transmitted normalized data to the monitoring platform.
cases.result: The operator gained centralized visibility into storage system operation and alarms.
cases.notes: Good renewable energy expansion case.

cases.title: Wastewater Treatment Plant Monitoring with Remote IO and RTU
cases.challenge: Plant operators needed unified visibility into distributed process equipment and water quality signals.
cases.solution: Remote IO and RTU devices collected field signals and transmitted process data and alarms to the monitoring system.
cases.result: The plant improved centralized monitoring of process equipment and alarms.
cases.notes: High-value water process case.

cases.title: Remote Weather Station Monitoring with LoRaWAN Gateway
cases.challenge: Environmental teams needed weather data from remote outdoor locations without wired network access.
cases.solution: Weather sensors transmitted data through LoRaWAN and cellular backhaul to an MQTT-based monitoring platform.
cases.result: The team gained centralized access to weather data from distributed outdoor stations.
cases.notes: Good reusable environmental and agriculture support case.

cases.title: Remote Valve Status Monitoring for Water Pipeline Network
cases.challenge: Operators needed remote visibility into valve position and abnormal pressure conditions across a pipeline network.
cases.solution: RTU and Remote IO devices collected valve and pressure signals and sent alarms through cellular connectivity.
cases.result: Operators gained faster visibility into valve status changes and pipeline pressure anomalies.
cases.notes: Useful case for both water and oil/gas valve monitoring pages.

cases.title: Grain Silo Temperature Monitoring with LoRa Sensors
cases.challenge: The storage operator needed distributed silo temperature visibility to identify abnormal heating risks.
cases.solution: LoRa sensors collected temperature and humidity data from silo points and sent readings to the monitoring platform.
cases.result: The operator gained better visibility into grain storage conditions and abnormal temperature trends.
cases.notes: Supports agriculture and storage clusters.

cases.title: Construction Site Dust and Noise Monitoring with 4G Gateway
cases.challenge: The contractor needed remote environmental data and alarms from temporary outdoor construction monitoring points.
cases.solution: Sensors were connected through wireless and cellular gateways to report dust, noise, and weather data to a dashboard.
cases.result: The site team gained remote access to environmental trends and threshold alarms.
cases.notes: Useful environmental long-tail case.

cases.title: Remote Equipment Rental Monitoring with 4G IoT Gateway
cases.challenge: The rental company needed remote usage and status data from machines deployed at customer sites.
cases.solution: A cellular IoT gateway collected machine runtime, status, and fault data and sent it to the fleet monitoring platform.
cases.result: The company gained better visibility into equipment utilization and service needs.
cases.notes: Good OEM/remote equipment case if product supports the required interfaces.

cases.title: Hospital Water System Monitoring with Remote IO
cases.challenge: Facility operators needed centralized visibility into water pressure, tank level, and pump alarms.
cases.solution: Remote IO and gateway devices collected facility water system signals and sent data to a centralized dashboard.
cases.result: Facility staff gained better alarm visibility and historical data for water system operation.
cases.notes: P3 because claims must stay within facility monitoring, not medical systems.

cases.title: Smart Irrigation Canal Monitoring with LoRa Gateway
cases.challenge: The irrigation operator needed water level and gate status visibility across long canal sections.
cases.solution: LoRa and RTU devices collected level and status data and transmitted readings to a central monitoring dashboard.
cases.result: The operator gained better visibility into irrigation water distribution and abnormal level events.
cases.notes: Good agriculture-water overlap case.

cases.title: Oil Tank Level Monitoring with 4G RTU
cases.challenge: The operator needed remote tank level visibility and alarm reporting from oil storage sites without wired network access.
cases.solution: IoTEdges 4G RTU collected analog level signals and tank alarm status, then sent data to the cloud monitoring platform through MQTT.
cases.result: The operator gained centralized tank visibility and faster abnormal level alarm handling.
cases.notes: High-conversion case for oil, fuel, and remote tank monitoring pages.

cases.title: Commercial Building Energy Monitoring with MQTT Gateway
cases.challenge: The facility team needed centralized energy and alarm data from meters and equipment distributed across the building.
cases.solution: IoTEdges gateway collected Modbus meter data and facility alarm signals and published them to a building energy dashboard.
cases.result: The facility team gained clearer visibility into building energy use and abnormal equipment conditions.
cases.notes: Strong building and energy case; useful for commercial facility landing pages.
